Conversations.searchPlaceholder: Search by agent name or conversation ID...
Conversations.adjustSearch: Try adjusting your search query or filters.
Conversations.conversationsWillAppear: Conversations will appear here once users start chatting.
Conversations.takeOverMessage: Are you sure you want to take over this conversation? You will be able to respond to the user directly.
Conversations.takeOverFailed: Failed to take over conversation. Please try again.

ConversationDetail.title: Conversation Details
ConversationDetail.refreshProfileHint: Click "Refresh" to fetch Instagram profile info.
ConversationDetail.messagesWillAppear: Messages will appear here once the conversation starts.

CRM.title: CRM Pipeline
CRM.subtitle: Drag conversations between stages
CRM.deleteConfirm: Click Delete again to confirm removing "{name}"

Agents.title: Agents
Agents.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, specialty, or agent ID...
Agents.createFirstAgent: Create your first AI agent to start chatting with clients.
Agents.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete agent "{name}"? This action will deactivate the agent. This action cannot be undone.
Agents.failedToClone: Failed to clone agent. Please try again.
Agents.failedToLoadForEdit: Failed to load agent for editing. Please try again.
Agents.failedToDelete: Failed to delete agent. Please try again.

Wizard.startOverConfirm: Are you sure you want to start over? This will clear all your current progress and cannot be undone.
Wizard.basicInfoDesc: Provide basic information about the agent and company.
Wizard.languagesHint: Select one or more languages. At least one language must be selected.
Wizard.styleDesc: Configure the communication style and tone of the agent.
Wizard.empathyHint: How empathetic and understanding the agent should be (0-10)
Wizard.depthHint: How detailed and thorough responses should be (0-10)
Wizard.examplesDesc: Provide examples of how you want the agent to communicate. These examples will guide the agent's style and tone. Examples should be in English, but the agent will respond in the user's language.
Wizard.standardExamplesHint: These are common questions patients ask. You can edit them to match your preferred style.
Wizard.customExamplesHint: Add your own examples to demonstrate specific communication scenarios. Maximum 4 custom examples.
Wizard.addCustomExampleHint: Click "Add Custom Example" to add your own communication examples.
Wizard.examplesTip: These examples demonstrate the desired communication style. The agent will learn from these examples to match your preferred tone, formality level, and response style. Make sure examples reflect the style settings you configured in the previous step.
Wizard.ragDesc: Enable RAG to provide context-aware responses based on documents about the agent and company.
Wizard.ragDescription: Retrieval-Augmented Generation allows the agent to use your documents for context-aware responses.
Wizard.manageDocumentsHint: — upload files, organize in folders (PDF, txt, md, json, images).
Wizard.ragAfterCreate: After creating the agent, you'll add documents on the RAG page — folders, PDFs, images.
Wizard.escalationDesc: Configure when the agent should hand off a conversation to a human operator.
Wizard.contactDetectionHint: Escalate automatically when the user shares a phone number or email address.
Wizard.addRuleHint: Add rules to define additional escalation scenarios specific to your business.
Wizard.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. When the user expresses strong dissatisfaction or files a complaint — transfer to a human immediately.
Wizard.descriptionHelper: Describe the situation and what the agent should do.
Wizard.llmDesc: Configure the language model parameters for agent responses.
Wizard.temperatureHint: Controls randomness (0 = deterministic, 2 = very creative). Recommended: 0.2 for consistent responses.
Wizard.maxTokensHelper: Maximum length of generated responses (1–4096 tokens)
Wizard.reviewDesc: Review your agent configuration before creating.
Wizard.reviewUpdateDesc: Review your agent configuration before updating.
Wizard.jsonEditorHint: You can edit the JSON configuration directly. Changes will be applied when you create the agent.
Wizard.promptsHint: Customize the system prompts that guide the agent's behaviour. Leave blank to use the default templates. Available placeholders: {'{agent_display_name}'}, {'{company_display_name}'}.
Wizard.personaHelper: How the agent presents itself — its identity, tone, and role.
Wizard.hardRulesHelper: Absolute boundaries — what the agent must never do, regardless of context.
Wizard.goalHelper: The agent's primary objective — what success looks like in each conversation.
Wizard.agentIdRequired: Agent ID is required. Please fill in the company name.
Wizard.invalidJsonCreate: Invalid JSON configuration. Please fix the errors before creating the agent.
Wizard.invalidJsonUpdate: Invalid JSON configuration. Please fix the errors before updating the agent.
Wizard.agentExists: Agent ID "{id}" already exists. Please edit the Agent ID manually in the JSON Editor.
Wizard.createFailed: Failed to create agent. Please try again.
Wizard.updateFailed: Failed to update agent. Please try again.
Wizard.draftEditLoaded: Configuration for "{id}" has been loaded. Make your changes and click "Update Agent" when ready.
Wizard.draftCloneLoaded: Configuration from "{id}" has been loaded. Please review and update the Agent ID.
Wizard.draftRestored: Your previous progress has been restored.

Login.title: Admin Login
Login.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a login code.
Login.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
Login.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Login.unableToConnect: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection.
Login.invalidOrExpiredCode: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
